Title: ~mission(TargetName) Reported Missing
Description:
ABOUT THE JOB
After receiving a report that ~mission(TargetName) has been missing, microTech Protection Services is seeking a qualified contractor to begin an onsite search of ~mission(Location|Address) to learn their current whereabouts. The missing individual was last seen entering the ~mission(Location) so it's recommended to begin the search there.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to ~mission(Location|address).
• Confirm the location of ~mission(TargetName) and if they are still alive.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years security experience.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with conducting missing person investigations.
